title: Deliciously Dense Jamaican Cornmeal Bake
description: A yeasty and snappy Jamaican dish featuring fine yellow cornmeal, soffritto-base, and FODMAP-friendly ingredients, perfect for a cozy meal. It combines the warmth of Jamaican spices with the comfort of a dense cornmeal bake.

ingredients.name: scotch bonnet pepper
ingredients.notes: seeded and finely chopped, use gloves

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, yeast, salt, and sugar.
In a separate pan, heat the oil over medium heat and saute the onion, bell pepper, and scotch bonnet pepper until they are softened.
Add the sauteed mixture to the cornmeal mixture and stir well.
Gradually add the water to the mixture, stirring until it forms a thick batter.
Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
